PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BEHAN MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE AND SPECIAL INTERRROGATORIES SET 1
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. WALTER J. LIN, Esq. of Law Office of Michael Heath (Tel: 415-931-4207) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BEHAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET 1.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their own behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion (including the request for sanctions) is granted.
